error.signature: RAG retrieval returns irrelevant results despite relevant documents existing in the index

verdict.summary: Embedding models have max token limits (e.g., 8191 for ada-002). Text beyond the limit is silently truncated. If chunks are larger than the embedding model's limit, only the beginning is semantically captured. Small chunks lose context.

dead_ends.action: Use large chunk sizes (10K+ tokens) for more context per chunk
dead_ends.why_fails: Embedding model silently truncates beyond its max tokens. A 10K token chunk with 8191 limit embeds only the first 82%. The answer might be in the truncated part.

dead_ends.action: Use very small chunks (50-100 tokens) for precision
dead_ends.why_fails: Small chunks lose surrounding context. 'It was resolved in v2.3' means nothing without knowing what 'it' refers to.

workarounds.action: Set chunk size to 50-80% of embedding model's max token limit with overlap
workarounds.how: chunk_size=512, chunk_overlap=64  # for models with 8191 max tokens. Overlap preserves context boundaries.

workarounds.action: Use parent-child chunking: embed small chunks but retrieve parent documents
workarounds.how: Embed 256-token chunks. On retrieval, return the 2048-token parent document containing the matched chunk.

workarounds.action: Add metadata (title, section headers) to each chunk before embedding
